subject: refactor(ui): make PageDots size prop required, drop responsive fallback
body:
All consumers already pass explicit size via FIXED_HEIGHTS.m. The old
responsive classes (44px mobile, 32px desktop) shrunk dots on desktop
for no good reason — desktop has more space, not less.

Tags: ui, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
